query: UPDATE weighingInstruments SET deviceCode = CONCAT('INS-', LPAD(id, 4, '0')) WHERE deviceCode = '' OR deviceCode IS NULL;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user KBF53B6TGXz9Z1D.root --database SQ6yxhwuwXauyoM9DVdVk2 --execute UPDATE weighingInstruments SET deviceCode = CONCAT('INS-', LPAD(id, 4, '0')) WHERE deviceCode = '' OR deviceCode IS NULL;
